Contact us

Contact us

Get notified at launch

DirectScribe is coming to the Mac App Store. Tell us a little about yourself below and we'll notify you the moment it's available, along with early access details.

Why we ask for a CPSO number

DirectScribe is built for physicians across Canada. We're starting this trial in Ontario first, so we ask for your College of Physicians and Surgeons of Ontario (CPSO) registration number to verify you're a real, currently registered physician before we set up access — it's how we confirm genuine interest ahead of launch.

Your College of Physicians and Surgeons of Ontario registration number.

Where this goes

This form submits securely over HTTPS straight to our inbox — nothing you type here is stored on a server in between; it's relayed and nowhere else.

See pricing Read the security design
DirectScribe

A Mac-native, bring-your-own-API-key dictation app for physicians in private practice across Canada. Built by a physician.

Not legal advice. DirectScribe is a documentation tool. Compliance materials on this site are general information to help you and your privacy advisor do your own assessment under PIPEDA and your province's health-privacy law (e.g., PHIPA in Ontario). They are not legal advice and do not create any professional relationship.

© 2026 DirectScribe · Made for macOS · This site runs no scripts and sets no cookies. · directscribe.ca
